sources.page_title: Innovacar S2 Foamy Color Blue | Blue Active Foam Shampoo for Deep Cleansing - JMProducts
sources.cleaned_content:
# Innovacar S2 Foamy Color Blue - Blue Snow Foam Car Shampoo

Brand: Innovacar

Price: €22,44 EUR
Contents: 1000ML
Low stock

Innovacar S2 Foamy Color Blue is a pH-neutral car shampoo with a unique blue foam effect. This product is perfect for cleaning your car and adds a playful, colorful experience to washing your vehicle. Thanks to its enzyme technology, it effectively removes organic dirt and provides a deep clean without damaging coatings or wax layers.

## Dilution Table

| Application | Recommended dilution | Product (ml) | Water (ml) | Remark |
| Foam lance/gun | 1:9 – 1:12 | 100 – 75 | 900 – 925 | Final dilution when used: 1:150 – 1:195 |
| Foam lance/gun (wash frequently) | 1:25 – 1:50 | 40 – 20 | 960 – 980 | Final dilution when used: 1:390 – 1:765 |
| Pre-wash (weekly soiling) | pure – 1:20 | up to 50 | 950 | Final dilution when used: up to 1:315 |

## How to use

Step 1: Preparation
Make sure the car is in the shade and the surface is cool.

Step 2: Dilution & Application
Foam gun / foam lance: Mix 1:9 to 1:12 (100-75 ml product to 1L water). During use, dilute further to 1:150-1:195.
Frequent washing: Mix 1:25 to 1:50 (40-20 ml product to 1L water). During use, dilute further to 1:390-1:765.
Pre-wash for weekly soiling: Use pure or mix up to 1:20 (50 ml product to 1L water). During use it dilutes further to 1:315.
Shake well and apply evenly, starting at the bottom and working up to avoid drips.

Step 3: Rinse & Finish
Rinse with a pressure washer, starting at the top and working down.
Make sure all color residue is completely removed.

Important Tip:
Do not allow to dry on the surface and do not use on hot paint or in direct sunlight. Use gloves when handling the pure product.

## Specifications

pH value: 6.00 (neutral)
Average consumption: 20 ml per vehicle
Safe for coatings & wax layers
With enzyme technology for deep cleaning

## Characteristics

Blue Snow Foam Effect: Creates a colorful, thick layer of foam that completely covers the vehicle, making it a visually appealing experience. The blue color also helps during rinsing, so you can see exactly where there is still foam.

pH Neutral Formula: Gentle on nanotechnological protection films and prevents them from being damaged during washing.

Deep Organic Cleansing: With the addition of enzymes that actively remove organic dirt and enhance car cleaning.

Plant-based surfactants: The formula is completely biodegradable and contains no phosphates, EDTA or NTA.

Flower Explosion Fragrance: A lovely floral scent that makes you feel like you are in a field of blooming flowers.

## Hazard information

- H319 - Causes serious eye irritation
- H315 - Causes skin irritation.
- P102 - Keep out of the reach of children.

Product Images:

![image](//jmproducts.be/cdn/shop/files/shampoo-auto-foam-ph-neutro-s2-foamy-color-blu-innovacar_jpg_720x720_1917708e-08e3-441d-859f-7eaa697bd908.jpg?v=1739043224&width=1946)

sources.cleaned_content:
# INNOVACAR S2 Foamy Blue Flower Colored Foam 1L

Brand: Innovacar
Price: $37.99 CAD
3%+ Discount with 3+ of the Same Item

Blue S2 Foam Color by Innovacar is the car shampoo that generates a blue snow foam to clean your car effectively, even with a neutral pH. It also creates a colorful effect specifically without compromising on the cleaning capacity of the original formula.

It represents the ideal alternative to achieving a thrill during the washing steps, without ruining the protection of previously applied nanotechnological protective films.

- Color effect active foam: this creates a cheerful blue tinged foam that covers the entire bodywork of the car. Plus, the color aids the rinsing stage by making the residues clearly visible and making it possible to correctly manage the times and duration of this step.
- Sweet watermelon fragrance: during the application of the product it releases the summery scent of sweet watermelon.
- Enzyme-based organic decontamination: Blue S2 Foamy Color with added enzymes provides deep cleaning, subject to patent protection, this makes it a product suitable for organic decontamination and for fighting organic dirt with direct action on dirt substrate molecules.
- Plant-derived surfactants: thanks in part to the use of plant-derived surfactants and the absence of added phosphorus, EDTA and NTA is completely biodegradable.
- Gentle touch on gaskets and plastics: also with the aid of plant-based surfactants and no added sodium hydroxide, the product can reduce the "stress cracking" process on plastic.
- PH neutral shampoo detergent: The 6.00 pH of the detergent is neutral, making it a suitable solution to avoid damaging interactions with the nanotechnological protective films. It does not ruin previously applied layers.
- High concentration: thanks to the considerable concentration, it is possible to obtain effective cleaning and a high washing power also with the use of a small amount.

## HOW TO USE S2 FOAMY BLUE

We recommend using Blue S2 Foamy car shampoo with a foam gun. The brightness of the color is based on the dilution of the product. Recommended use:

- Dilute the product according to the indications and selected mode of use. Stir the foam wand to mix the detergent and water to obtain a homogenous solution.
- Deliver the foam over the entire car, starting on the bottom and applying it horizontally to then gradually move upwards. This will prevent any dripping during rinsing.
- Proceed with rinsing with plenty of high pressure water. Work horizontally from the top of the car and gradually working downwards.
- Be particularly careful to rinse the car generously until all of the color is completely removed from the car and hidden nooks.

If applied with a foam lance or foam gun: the recommended dilution ranges from 1:9 to 1:12, use from 100 ml to 75 ml of product and add the remaining part of water (from 900 ml to 925 ml) to obtain 1 L of ready-for-use solution. During supply, the actual final dilution can reach approximately 1:150 to 1:195.

For frequent washing the recommended dilution ranges from 1:25 to 1:50, use from 40 ml to 20 ml of product and add the remaining part of water (from 960 ml to 980 ml) to obtain 1 L of ready-for-use solution. While dispensing, the actual final dilution can reach approximately 1:390 to 1:765.

If used for pre-washing for weekly dirt: the recommended dilution ranges from pure to 1:20; then use up to 50 ml of product and fill the remaining part with water (950 ml) to obtain 1 L of ready-for-use solution. While dispensing, the actual final dilution can reach approximately 1:315.

Product Images:
![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/INNOVACARS2FoamyBlueFlowerColoredFoam1L.webp?v=1761861415&width=1800)

Blue S2 Foamy Color by Innovacar is the colored pH neutral foam car shampoo suited for washing the car, creating a specific color effect, preserving the performance characteristics of the colorless neutral formula.

It is the ideal product for achieving a cheerful effect during washing, preserving any previously applied nanotechnological protective films.

Main features:

- Blue Snow Foam effect: it creates an adherent and colored foam that covers the car. A fun effect that recalls the color of the sea and a thousand blue bubbles. The color also helps during the rinsing stage, guiding time and duration: simply proceed with plenty of water until it is completely removed from the bodywork of the car.
- Plant-based surfactants: also thanks to the use of plant-based surfactants and no added phosphorus, EDTA or NTA it is completely biodegradable.
- Flower Explosion: Intense floral essence that accompanies the wash and will make you feel like you are in a field of flowers.
- PH neutral car shampoo: This is a gentle and non-aggressive shampoo with pH of 6.0 pH, particularly suitable for nanotechnological protective films as it does not remove or ruin them.
- Organic Decontamination: Blue S2 Foamy Color with added enzymes, subject to patent protection, provides a deep organic decontamination. The formula fights organic dirt with an active action on dirt substrate molecules.
- High concentration: The product is concentrated, and cleaning with effective washing power can be achieved even with a small amount of shampoo.
- It does not damage plastic or seals: By also using plant-based surfactants and not containing any added sodium hydroxide, this solution guarantees the safety of the delicate parts of the car, such as plastic and seals.

### Directions:

Foam Cannon Dilution Ratio - 1:9 to 1:12

The recommended dilution ranges from 1:9 to 1:12, use from 100 ml to 75 ml of product and add the remaining part of water (from 900 ml to 925 ml) to obtain 1 L of ready-for-use solution. During supply, the actual final dilution can reach approximately 1:150 to 1:195.

For frequent washing the recommended dilution ranges from 1:25 to 1:50, use from 40 ml to 20 ml of product and add the remaining part of water (from 960 ml to 980 ml) to obtain 1 L of ready-for-use solution. While dispensing, the actual final dilution can reach approximately 1:390 to 1:765.

- With enzymes: YES
- Coating safety: YES
- Surface safety: YES

* Patent Application No. 14730984.3

## S2 FOAMY COLOR BLUE IS IDEAL FOR

- Washing the car with a touch of color.
- Cleaning contaminations from the bodywork.
- Fighting traces of organic road dirt.
- During the washing phase, treating cars with nanotechnological protective films thanks to the gentle action of the formula and the lubricated foam.
- Also safely clean the plastics and vehicle gaskets.

## HOW TO USE S2 FOAMY COLOR BLUE

We recommend using the blue foam car shampoo with a foam gun. The color varies based on the dilution of the product. Recommended use:

- Dilute the product according to the indications and selected mode of use.
- Stir the foam wand to mix the detergent and water to obtain a homogenous solution.
- Deliver the foam over the entire car, starting on the bottom and applying it horizontally to then gradually move upwards. This will prevent any dripping during rinsing.
- Proceed with rinsing with plenty of high pressure water. Work horizontally from the top of the car and gradually working downwards.

Be particularly careful to rinse generously until all of the color is completely removed from the car and hidden nooks.

If applied with a foam lance or foam gun: the recommended dilution ranges from 1:9 to 1:12, use from 100 ml to 75 ml of product and add the remaining part of water (from 900 ml to 925 ml) to obtain 1 L of ready-for-use solution. During supply, the actual final dilution can reach approximately 1:150 to 1:195.

For frequent washing the recommended dilution ranges from 1:25 to 1:50, use from 40 ml to 20 ml of product and add the remaining part of water (from 960 ml to 980 ml) to obtain 1 L of ready-for-use solution. While dispensing, the actual final dilution can reach approximately 1:390 to 1:765.

If used for pre-washing for weekly dirt: the recommended dilution ranges from pure to 1:20; then use up to 50 ml of product and fill the remaining part with water (950 ml) to obtain 1 L of ready-for-use solution. While dispensing, the actual final dilution can reach approximately 1:315.

Precautions: do not apply in the sun and on hot surfaces, fabrics or porous surfaces. Do not let the product dry. When diluting the pure product it is advisable to use suitable gloves and be careful to protect your hands and clothes from the pure color as it is highly concentrated.

Blue S2 Foamy Color by Innovacar is the colored pH neutral foam car shampoo suited for washing the car, creating a specific color effect, preserving the performance characteristics of the colorless neutral formula.

## S2 FOAMY COLOR BLUE IS IDEAL FOR

- Washing the car with a touch of color.
- Cleaning contaminations from the bodywork.
- Fighting traces of organic road dirt.
- During the washing phase, treating cars with nanotechnological protective films thanks to the gentle action of the formula and the lubricated foam.
- Also safely clean the plastics and vehicle gaskets.

## HOW TO USE S2 FOAMY COLOR BLUE

We recommend using the blue foam car shampoo with a foam gun. The color varies based on the dilution of the product. Recommended use:

- Dilute the product according to the indications and selected mode of use.
- Stir the foam wand to mix the detergent and water to obtain a homogenous solution.
- Deliver the foam over the entire car, starting on the bottom and applying it horizontally to then gradually move upwards. This will prevent any dripping during rinsing.
- Proceed with rinsing with plenty of high pressure water. Work horizontally from the top of the car and gradually working downwards.

Be particularly careful to rinse generously until all of the color is completely removed from the car and hidden nooks.

If applied with a foam lance or foam gun: the recommended dilution ranges from 1:9 to 1:12, use from 100 ml to 75 ml of product and add the remaining part of water (from 900 ml to 925 ml) to obtain 1 L of ready-for-use solution. During supply, the actual final dilution can reach approximately 1:150 to 1:195.

For frequent washing the recommended dilution ranges from 1:25 to 1:50, use from 40 ml to 20 ml of product and add the remaining part of water (from 960 ml to 980 ml) to obtain 1 L of ready-for-use solution. While dispensing, the actual final dilution can reach approximately 1:390 to 1:765.

If used for pre-washing for weekly dirt: the recommended dilution ranges from pure to 1:20; then use up to 50 ml of product and fill the remaining part with water (950 ml) to obtain 1 L of ready-for-use solution. While dispensing, the actual final dilution can reach approximately 1:315.

Precautions: do not apply in the sun and on hot surfaces, fabrics or porous surfaces. Do not let the product dry. When diluting the pure product it is advisable to use suitable gloves and be careful to protect your hands and clothes from the pure color as it is highly concentrated.

## SAFETY INFO & TECHNICAL DATA SHEET

PRODUCT CODE: 700507 - S2 FOAMY BLUE FLOWER EXPLOSION 1000 ml

SAFETY INFORMATION:
DANGER
H315 Causes skin irritation.
H318 Causes serious eye damage.
H412 Harmful to aquatic organisms with long lasting effects.
P101 If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand.
P102 Keep out of reach of children.
P103 Read carefully and follow all instructions.
P280 Wear protective gloves/protective clothing/eye protection/face protection.
P305+P351+P338 in case of contact with the eyes: rinse carefully with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing.
P310 Immediately contact the Poison Centre.
P501 Dispose of contents/container in accordance with local regulations.

Contains: CAPRYL GLUCOSIDE, ETHANOLAMINE, acetic acid, (2-butoxyethoxy), SODIUM C14-16 OLEFIN SULFONATE. NOPYL ACETATE, 4-TERT-BUTYLCYCLOHEXYL ACETATE, CYCLAMEN ALDEHYDE, UNDECYLENAL, GERANYL ACETATE, TRANS-ANETHOLE, METHYLUNDECANAL, TETRAHYDROLINALOOL, TERPINEOL. may produce an allergic reaction.

Contains among other ingredients: Equal to or greater than 15% but below 30%: non-ionic surfactants. Equal to or greater than 5% but below 15%: anionic surfactants. Less than 5%: Polycarboxylates. Enzymes. Perfume (COUMARIN, GERANIOL, HEXYL CINNAMAL, BUTYLPHENYL METHYLPROPIONAL, LIMONENE), preservatives (BENZISOTHIAZOLINONE, PHENOXYETHANOL).

The product contains completely biodegradable surfactants according to regulation 648/2004/EC.

Effectively the tinted shampoo makes it easy to figure out the areas you are covering for later rinsing, the scent is beautiful, it smells like freshly done laundry !!! Excellent I highly recommend it ! Shiny car !!!
